description_long: This is a heavily weathered, rusted all-terrain tow truck with a robust, armored body and exaggerated, oversized wheels featuring deep, aggressive treads. The vehicle is adorned with a large star emblem on the door, metallic bull horns on the hood, and a visible winch and towing rig at the rear, complete with cables and pulleys. The cab is compact, with a single door on each side, and the windows are small and reinforced, suggesting a rugged, utilitarian design. The tires are unusually large and spaced far from the body, giving the vehicle a lifted, off-road stance. The surface is predominantly rust-brown with patches of exposed metal, and the overall appearance is that of a post-apocalyptic or heavily customized utility vehicle. The front grille is prominent, and the rear features a detailed towing assembly, making it suitable for recovery or support roles in challenging environments.
description: A rusted, armored all-terrain tow truck with oversized, knobby wheels, bull horns on the hood, and a detailed towing rig at the rear. Its weathered surface and rugged design evoke a post-apocalyptic utility vehicle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the star emblem, bull horn, and the full length of the towing rig and winch assembly.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the towing rig, cables, and the wide stance of the oversized wheels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible door panels, additional surface details, and the full profile of the wheels and towing equipment.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the prominent grille, bull horns, and the aggressive, outward-angled wheels.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a knobby, deep all-terrain tread pattern with large, widely spaced lugs designed for maximum traction on rough and loose surfaces.
